studyName: eMERGE Network Imputed GWAS for 41 phenotypes

tables.description: Dataset includes case/control status for and size of abdominal aortic aneurism, plus case/control status of  n=46  co-morbidities, including cerebro-vascular disease, coronary stenosis, emphysema, thrombocytopenia, unintentional weight loss, etc., and informs about use of medication (e.g. oral steroids, diuretics, anti-psychotics, anti-platelet, dyslipidimia medication), and smoking status.

variables.name: AAA_Size
variables.description: AAA size

variables.name: Age_At_Enrollment
variables.description: Age at time of diagnosis for cases, at time of enrollment in biobank for controls

variables.name: Alcoholism
variables.description: Flag indicating Alcoholism. Either on problem list or >=4 dx on different days from OP/IP encounters.

variables.name: Anemia
variables.description: Flag indicating Anemia. Either on problem list or >=4 dx on different days from OP/IP encounters.

variables.description: Flag indicating Anorexia. Either on problem list or >=4 dx on different days from OP/IP encounters.

variables.description: Flag indicating Anti-Psychotic med use. At >= 2 indications of use.  Indications >= 180 days apart.

variables.description: Flag indicating Anticoagulant med use. At >= 2 indications of use. Indications >= 180 days apart.

variables.name: Antihypertension_Meds_Use
variables.description: Flag indicating Antihypertension med use. At >= 2 indications of use. Indications >= 180 days apart.

variables.name: Antiplatelet_Meds_Use
variables.description: Flag indicating Antiplatelet med use. At >= 2 indications of use. Indications >= 180 days apart.

variables.description: Flag indicating Aplastic Anemia. Either on problem list or >=4 dx on different days from OP/IP encounters

tables.description: Dataset includes data of case/control status for extreme obesity, T2D, and n=28 co-morbidities including alcoholism, depression, thyroid disorder, etc., smoking status, height/weight data, and use of steroids, anti-psychotic drugs, and smoking status.

variables.name: Alcohol_use

variables.name: Anti_Psychotic_Use

tables.description: Description of colonoscopy results including presence of anatomical location of polyps (n=24 variables), and age at colonoscopy.

variables.name: Age_at_Colonoscopy
variables.description: Age when had colonoscopy

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Deidentified Subject/eMERGE ID

variables.name: adenoma_left
variables.description: Number of colon polyps of type adenoma (subtype not otherwise specified) found on the left side of the colon

variables.name: adenoma_na
variables.description: Number of colon polyps of type adenoma (subtype not otherwise specified) found on an unspecified side of the colon

variables.name: adenoma_right
variables.description: Number of colon polyps of type adenoma (subtype not otherwise specified) found on the right side of the colon

variables.name: carcinoma_NA
variables.description: Number of colon polyps of type carcinoma found on an unspecified side of the colon

variables.name: carcinoma_left
variables.description: Number of colon polyps of type carcinoma found on the left side of the colon

variables.name: carcinoma_right
variables.description: Number of colon polyps of type carcinoma found on the right side of the colon

variables.name: colonoscopy_visit_ID
variables.description: A unique number assigned to this colonoscopy to differentiate it from other colonoscopies that may have occurred at the same age

variables.name: hamartoma_NA
variables.description: Number of colon polyps of type hamartoma found on an unspecified side of the colon

variables.description: Number of colon polyps of type hamartoma found on the left side of the colon

tables.description: Dataset includes information about co-morbidities of asthma, bronchitis, bronchiectasis, COPD, emphysema, allergic alveolitis,  GERD, and smoking status of participants.

variables.name: AGE_at_ACEicough
variables.description: Age at ACEi cough diagnosis

variables.name: Allergic_alveolitis
variables.description: Flag indicating subject has post-nasal drip ICD9s (495.X) ever

variables.name: Asthma
variables.description: Asthma History Ind-2 Yes/No indicator to ask whether there is a history of asthma ICD9s (see list) ever

variables.name: Bronchiectasis
variables.description: Flag indicating subject has asthma ICD9s (494.X) ever

variables.name: Bronchitis
variables.description: Flag indicating subject has Bronchitis ICD9s (490) ever

variables.name: COPD
variables.description: Flag indicating subject has COPD ICD9s (496=Chronic airway obstruction, not elsewhere classified) ever

variables.name: Case_Control
variables.description: Case - control status

variables.name: Chronic_Bronchitis
variables.description: Flag indicating subject has Chronic Bronchitis ICD9s (491.X) ever

variables.name: Emphysema
variables.description: Flag indicating subject has Emphysema ICD9s (492.X) ever

variables.name: GERD
variables.description: Flag indicating subject has GERD ICD9s (530.11, 530.81) ever

variables.name: Post_Nasal_Drip
variables.description: Flag indicating subject has post-nasal drip ICD9s (461.X, 473.X) ever

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Deidentified eMERGE ID

variables.name: Smoking_Status
variables.description: Flag indicating smoking status - just ever (=4)  or never (=1)

tables.description: Dataset informs about case/control and age of diagnosis of diverticulitis/diverticulosis, BMI data at last colonoscopy, and smoking status.

variables.name: AGE_ENROLLMENT
variables.description: Age at Enrollment in DNA biorepository

variables.name: AGE_FIRST_DIAGNOSIS
variables.description: Age at first diagnosis of phenotype

variables.name: AGE_LAST_COLONOSCOPY
variables.description: Age at last colonoscopy

variables.name: BMI_AT_1ST_DIAGNOSIS
variables.description: Subject's Body Mass Index closest to time of diagnosis of phenotype (for cases)

variables.name: BMI_AT_LAST_COLONOSCOPY
variables.description: Subject's Body Mass Index closest to time of last colonoscopy

variables.name: CASE_CONTROL
variables.description: Case - control status: case if has diverticulois, control if not

variables.name: DIVERTICULITIS
variables.description: "Yes or no" if the patient has been diagnosed with diverticulitis, either positively noted during an imaging test or by diagnosis code (see list of codes in comments)

variables.name: DIVERTICULOSIS
variables.description: "Yes or no" if the patient has been diagnosed with diverticulosis, positively noted during an imaging test;  also yes if diagnosed with diverticulitis

variables.name: SMOKING_STATUS
variables.description: Self-reported smoking or smoking status as recorded in the EMR

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Deidentified Subject/eMERGE ID

tables.description: Dataset includes values case/control status of BPH, and for high/low PSA values (Prostate-Specific Antigen, n=4 variables), BMI data, and smoking status.

variables.name: AGE_AT_BMI
variables.description: Age (years) at BMI_at_1st_diagnosis

variables.name: Age_High_PSA
variables.description: Age at date at the highest PSA result

variables.name: Age_Low_PSA
variables.description: Age at date at the lowest PSA result

variables.name: BMI_AT_1ST_DIAGNOSIS
variables.description: Subject's Body Mass Index closest to first BPH-related ICD-9 code date (for cases) or most recent BMI value (for controls)

variables.name: CASE_CONTROL
variables.description: Case or Control as defined in the algorithm

variables.name: High_PSA
variables.description: Highest Result of PSA (prostate specific antigen) lab test

variables.name: Low_PSA
variables.description: Lowest Result of PSA (prostate specific antigen) lab test

variables.name: SMOKING_STATUS
variables.description: Flag indicating smoking status

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Deidentified ID where the first two digits denote the origination site of the samples

tables.description: Dataset includes HbA1c, HDL, LDL, total cholesterol, platelet and blood coagulation data.

variables.name: HDL
variables.description: A value which captures the amount of High Density Lipoprotein (HDL) Cholesterol in the blood measured in milligrams per deciliter (mg/dL). High Density Lipoprotein (HDL) Cholesterol, the "good" cholesterol synthesized in the liver, which mediates reverse cholesterol transport.

variables.name: HbA1c
variables.description: HbA1c value

variables.name: INR
variables.description: A value which captures the ratio of a patient's prothrombin time to a normal (control) sample, raised to the power of the ISI value for the analytical system being used

variables.name: LDL
variables.description: A value which captures the amount of Low Density Lipoprotein (LDL) Cholesterol in the blood measured in milligrams per deciliter (mg/dL). Low Density Lipoprotein (LDL) Cholesterol is associated with atherosclerosis, myocardial infarctions and strokes.

variables.name: Observation_Age
variables.description: Age when clinical event recorded in record

variables.name: Platelets
variables.description: A value which captures the amount of Platlet levels. Exclude platelet values taken <= 10 days after CPT codes: 36430-36460, 86960, 86999

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Deidentified Subject/eMERGE ID

variables.name: Serum_Total_Cholesterol
variables.description: A value which captures the amount of Total Cholesterol in the blood measured in milligrams per deciliter (mg/dL).

variables.name: Visit_Number
variables.description: A database generated unique key created for weight, height, BMI repeated values

tables.description: Dataset informs about case/control status, and history of dialysis, MRSA (Methicillin-Resistant Staphylococcus Aureus) and stay in hospital/nursing home facility.

variables.name: Age_Infection
variables.description: Age (in years) at time of the first qualifying infection for cases (blank for controls)

variables.name: Age_Last_Visit
variables.description: Age (in years) at time of last continuous enrollment visit for controls (blank for cases)

variables.name: Case_Control
variables.description: Case - Control Status

variables.name: Case_control_type
variables.description: For cases: whether a case meets gold or silver standard definition; else control or NA

variables.name: History_Dialysis
variables.description: Indicate if patient was  on dialysis in the year before MRSA Dx (cases only, leave blank for controls)

variables.name: History_MRSA
variables.description: Indicate if patient  ever had ANY TYPE of MRSA infection prior to caMRSA (community-associated Methicillin-Resistant Staphylococcus Aureus) infection

variables.name: NH_in_prior_yr
variables.description: Indicate if patient had a prior stay in a long term care facility/nursing home in the last year before MRSA infection

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Deidentified subject/eMERGE ID

tables.description: Dataset informs about age of intraocular hypertension, glaucoma, narrow-angle glaucoma diagnosis, and use of treatments (beta-blocker, glaucoma surgery, IOP medication).

variables.name: AGE_at_IOP_meds
variables.description: Age at earliest Intra-ocular pressure lowering medications where route is ophthalmic (if applicable). See IOP lowering med list tab.

variables.name: AGE_at_OHT
variables.description: Age at earliest Ocular Hypertension diagnosis in years

variables.name: AGE_at_beta_blocker
variables.description: Age at first systemic beta blocker (if applicable). See table of Systemic beta-blocker medications.

variables.name: AGE_at_glaucoma
variables.description: Age at earliest open-angle Glaucoma diagnosis in years (if applicable)

variables.name: AGE_at_glaucoma_surgery
variables.description: Age at earliest open-angle Glaucoma surgery procedure in years (if applicable)

variables.name: AGE_at_last_eye_exam
variables.description: Age at most recent eye exam in years

variables.name: AGE_at_narrow_angle_glaucoma
variables.description: Age at earliest narrow-angle Glaucoma diagnosis in years (if applicable)

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Deidentified Subject/eMERGE ID

tables.description: The dataset provides data of repeat BMI/height/weight measurements and age of observation.

variables.name: AGE_OBSERVATION
variables.description: Age when clinical event was recorded in record

variables.name: BODY_MASS_INDEX
variables.description: Subject's BMI over time

variables.name: HEIGHT
variables.description: Subject's height at enrollment

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: De-identified Subject/eMERGE ID

variables.name: VISIT_NUMBER
variables.description: A database generated unique key created for weight, height, BMI repeated values

variables.name: WEIGHT
variables.description: Subject's weight at enrollment

variables.name: YEAR_OBSERVATION
variables.description: Year when clinical event was recorded in record

tables.description: Acute Myocardial Infarct - dataset includes data about presence/absence of diabetes/ hypertension, MI, MACE (Major Adverse Cardiac Events), and smoking status.

variables.name: DIABETES
variables.description: If the patient has been diagnosed with T2DM previously, use the T2DM algorithm to determine

variables.name: HTN
variables.description: If the patient has been diagnosed with HTN previously (defined as ICD 401-405 + HTN meds)

variables.name: MACE
variables.description: Case/Control Status for MACE (Major Adverse Cardiac Events)

variables.name: MI
variables.description: Case/Control Status for MI

variables.name: PRIOR_MACE
variables.description: If the patient has a previous MACE

variables.name: SMOKING
variables.description: Smoking status

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Deidentified ID

tables.description: Dataset with height/weight data in obesity.

variables.name: Age1
variables.description: Age at time of first qualifing height/weight measurement

variables.name: Age2
variables.description: Age at time of second qualifing height/weight measurement

variables.name: H1
variables.description: Height of first qualifying height/weight measurement. NOTE: two measurements of >= 99th percentile (BMI) are needed on different calendar days.  H1/W1 and H2/W2 should be the latest two qualifying measurements.

variables.name: H2
variables.description: Height of second qualifying height/weight measurement

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Deidentified subject/eMERGE ID

variables.name: W1
variables.description: Weight of first qualifying height/weight measurement

variables.name: W2
variables.description: Weight of second qualifying height/weight measurement

variables.description: Age of Drug prescription

variables.name: Atypical_Anti
variables.description: Flag indicating medication is on the list of Atypical AntiPsychotics (Case)

variables.name: Drug_code
variables.description: The Name of the Drug listed in the medication sheet or corresponding Drug_Code variable in the RxNorm terminology

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Deidentified subject/eMERGE ID

variables.name: Steroid
variables.description: Flag indicating medication is a steroid

variables.name: Steroid_Dur
variables.description: If medication is a steroid, indicate total number of days taken
